overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a foggy rural backyard or path in a horror video game. The scene features a blue portable toilet on the left, a wooden shed on the right with balloons tied to it, and autumn foliage scattered on the ground. The atmosphere is ominous with low visibility due to heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between portable toilet and wooden shed

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through a foggy narrow path between structures

entered.detail: blue portable toilet or chemical toilet unit on the left side of the path
dark wooden building or shed wall on the right side
cluster of red and gray balloons tied to a post or object on the right
white rectangular concrete blocks or barriers in the middle of the path
ladder leaning against structure in the background on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward through a narrow foggy path in a rural setting. A blue portable toilet stands on the left while a wooden shed with balloons tied to it occupies the right. Concrete blocks are scattered in the path ahead, and trees are visible through the fog in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic rural path shrouded in heavy fog. It begins by gliding past a blue portable toilet on the left and a wooden shed adorned with tied balloons on the right. As the camera advances, the narrow corridor opens slightly to reveal concrete blocks scattered across the ground. The scene then pushes further into the haze, where the silhouettes of distant trees gradually emerge through the thick, ominous mist.
